mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (name, phone, gender, age, id_card, password, salt, status, profile_complete) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{idCard}, #{password}, #{salt}, 1, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET name = #{name}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, profile_complete = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE patient SET password = #{password}, salt = #{salt} WHERE id = #{id}
